title: Pan-Seared Cod with Smoky Bazaar Seasoning
description: A keto-friendly dish featuring pan-seared cod, smoky bazaar seasoning, and a hint of exotic spices.
instructions: Season the cod fillets with salt and smoky bazaar seasoning on both sides.
Heat the avocado oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the cod fillets for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Remove the cod from the skillet and place on a plate.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve with a lemon wedge on the side.
